title: Dornbirn, Vorarlberg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dornbirn, Vorarlberg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dornbirn is a city in Vorarlberg with a population of 50,360. The largest city in Vorarlberg, a gateway to the Bregenz Forest and Alpine region, known for its textile industry heritage and modern architecture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
